name: Google Safe Browsing
tagline: Check URLs against Google Safe Browsing
description: Search up to fifty URLs for malware, social-engineering, unwanted-software, and other known Safe Browsing threats.

auth.hint: Enable Safe Browsing API and send the Google API key in the key query parameter. Safe Browsing is limited to non-commercial use.

tools.name: search_threat_urls
tools.description: Check one or more URLs against Google's known threat expressions.

params.name: urls
params.description: URLs to inspect; no more than 50 may be sent in one request.
